zh.Alford, Lincolnshire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾阿福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wardwell於1562年出生在英國林可爾史爾阿福德時，他的父親Sir Hugh Wardale III32歲，母親Isabel Lascelles23歲。他和Margareta Marshall至少有8個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1642年9月15日在他的家鄉享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wardwell于1562年出生在英国林可爾史爾阿福德时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Wardale III32岁，母亲Isabel Lascelles23岁。他和Margareta Marshall至少有8个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1642年9月15日在他的家乡享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wardwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Wardle or a habitational name from a place called Wordwell in Suffolk, probably named with an Old English wride ‘bend’ + well ‘stream’.

variants.name: Wardle
meanings: habitational name from Wardle in Lancashire and possibly Wardle in Cheshire, both named with Old English weard-hyll ‘watch hill’. Compare Warden 2 and Wardlaw .
habitational name from Weardale (Durham), which takes its name from the river Wear (related to the Indo-European root wis-, weis- ‘liquid, flow’ or wedōr- ‘water’) + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wardwell was born in 1562, in Alford, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir Hugh Wardale III, was 32 and his mother, Isabel Lascelles, was 23. He had at least 8 sons and 2 daughters with Margareta Marshall. He died on 15 September 1642, in his hometown, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wardwell est né en 1562, à Alford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Wardale III, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabel Lascelles, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles avec Margareta Marshall. Il est décédé le 15 septembre 1642, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wardwell 1562 in Alford, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Wardale III 32 und seine Mutter Isabel Lascelles 23. Er hatte mit Margareta Marshall mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. September 1642 im Alter von 80 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wardwell è nato il nel 1562 nel Alford, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Wardale III, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Lascelles, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie con Margareta Marshall. Morì il 15 settembre 1642, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wardwellが1562年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Wardale IIIは32歳，母Isabel Lascellesは23歳であった。彼はMargareta Marshallとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1642年9月15日に故郷で80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wardwell(이)가 1562년 영국 링코실르 알퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Wardale III(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Lascelles(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Margareta Marshall(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1642년 9월 15일 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Alford, Lincolnshire, England, United Ki: Alford, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wardwell nasceu em 1562, em Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Wardale III, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Lascelles, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas com Margareta Marshall. Ele faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1642, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wardwell родился в 1562 г. в местности алфорд, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Wardale III было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Lascelles, 23. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери от Margareta Marshall. Он умер 15 сентября 1642 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Wardwell nació en 1562, en Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Wardale III, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Isabel Lascelles, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas con Margareta Marshall. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1642, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años.
